name: @legion/runtime-eve
description: ADR-004 runtime-eve adapter for Legion Next — implements the seven-method RuntimeDriver contract against Vercel Eve's public TypeScript surface (defineAgent, ctx.getSandbox, defineSandbox, defineRemoteAgent, defineEval). The Eve package is an optional peer dependency so the adapter compiles and tests pass without a live Eve install; production deployments pin eve@0.11.7.

scripts.test: pnpm --filter @legion/core build && pnpm run build && node --test --test-reporter=spec "test/**/*.test.mjs"
